title: Add Pointer Cursor to Clickable Table Rows and Cells
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the cursor to change to a pointer when hovering over clickable table areas, so that I can clearly identify interactive elements.
acceptance_criteria: Hovering over clickable table rows shows a pointer cursor
The `.clickable` CSS class is applied to interactive rows in Dictionary and Migration tables
Cursor behavior is consistent across all table-based views
ux_changes: Added pointer cursor on hover for clickable table rows in Dictionary and Migration views. Entire rows are now clickable for selection, providing clear visual affordance for interactivity.
implementation_notes: The `.clickable` CSS class was applied to table rows. Row click events were wired up to trigger row selection.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the approach of making entire rows clickable with cursor pointer. Implementation was completed and approved.
